title: Pink Light and Iron: Epistemo-Critical Writing in Walter Benjamin and Philip K. Dick
author: John McLoughlin
card_summary: A Cardiff University doctoral thesis comparing the labyrinthine, non-linear approaches to philosophical representation in Walter Benjamin's Arcades Project and The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick. Argues that both works embody a pluralistic notion of truth that can only be glimpsed indirectly, exploring what McLoughlin calls epistemo-critical writing.
